_note: Watchlist is now DYNAMIC — assembled each run from Phase 1.5 (morning screen) + any open positions. No fixed ticker list lives in config anymore. See .claude/skills/stock-trading/SKILL.md Phase 1.5 for the screen mechanics. Providers: Alpaca (account + snapshots), TradingView MCP coin_analysis (one call per ticker — no bulk endpoint), Finnhub /calendar/earnings (one batched HTTP call).

screen._filter_notes: rsi_range='any' casts a wide net — both oversold reversals and breakout momentum surface in one pass, and Phase 4 ranks them. min_volume_ratio=1.5 is a RELATIVE multiplier vs the scanner's baseline, not an absolute share count. max_candidates=15 per exchange gives Phase 4 enough names to rank meaningfully. The only client-side floor is min_price (penny-stock guard) applied after coin_analysis returns a price.

risk._max_position_pct_note: paper trading — tighten to 0.10 before going live. Raised 0.20→0.25 on 2026-04-14 to fit 4-position deploy of residual cash after AMDG fill.
risk._max_session_pct_note: paper trading — tighten to 0.50 before going live. Temporarily raised to 1.00 on 2026-04-14 to deploy residual cash after AMDG fill.
risk._max_spread_pct_note: paper trading — tighten to 0.003 (0.3%) before going live
